summary: Completed frontend testing of TEN MediaHQ service names update. All 6 requested features verified working correctly. Service names now match actual church services for both Envoy Nation and E-Nation teams.
passed_tests: Services page (/services) - Envoy Nation shows: Sunday Service (11:00), Leicester Blessings (19:00), Connected with PMO (19:00)
Services page - E-Nation shows: The Commissioned Envoy (14:00), Midweek Service (19:00)
Services page - Service type badges have correct colors: blue (Sunday Service), purple (Leicester Blessings), amber (Connected with PMO), green (Midweek Service)
Calendar page (/calendar) - February events show correct service names with team badges (Envoy Nation, E-Nation)
Calendar page - All events display: Sunday Service (Envoy Nation), Leicester Blessings, Connected with PMO, The Commissioned Envoy, E-Nation Midweek
Assign Rotas page - Envoy Nation shows: Sunday Service (11:00), Leicester Blessings (19:00), Connected with PMO (19:00)
Assign Rotas page - E-Nation shows: The Commissioned Envoy (14:00), Midweek Service (19:00)
Team selector works correctly to switch between Envoy Nation and E-Nation
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Services.js line 116 - isAdmin check only includes 'admin' and 'team_lead' roles, but 'director' role should also have access to Schedule Service button based on roleAccess config in App.js
test_credentials: Demo mode - click 'Try Demo Mode' button on login page. No credentials needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service names have been updated to match actual church services. Envoy Nation has Sunday Service (11am), Leicester Blessings (Thursday 7pm), Connected with PMO (last Thursday 7pm). E-Nation has The Commissioned Envoy (Sunday 2pm) and Midweek Service (Wednesday 7pm). Demo mode uses hardcoded service data (MOCKED). Schedule Service modal could not be tested as Director role doesn't have access to the button (minor code issue).

schedule_service_modal.reason: Director role does not have access to Schedule Service button (isAdmin check in Services.js only includes admin/team_lead)
